LanguageData.LTF_Research_TpBench.label: teleportation bench
LanguageData.LTF_Research_TpBench.description: Construct a workbench to control your teleportation system.
LanguageData.LTF_Research_TpSpot.label: teleportation spot
LanguageData.LTF_Research_TpSpot.description: Build a teleportation spot to send pawns elsewhere.
